case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSE LUIS VASQUEZ AGUILAR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED TO COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ON 08/09/2019. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE LUIS VASQUEZ
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED NOV-04-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE LUIS VASQUEZ $551.54 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $636.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $551.54 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE LUIS VASQUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE LUIS VASQUEZ AGUILAR DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, JOSE LUIS VASQUEZ
